title: ANIMEALS - 211info
text: FIDO PET FOOD BANK ANIMEALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dog food, cat food, and cat litter. Partners with Meals-On-Wheels to deliver to pet owners homes. 14186 Fir Street Suite 203 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Meals on Wheels recipients Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 655-3663 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-3663 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Past Clackamas County Public Services Building on Kaen Road. Turn left at parking lot F. Beside U-Haul. Services: Pet Food * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Pet Food * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - FIDO PET FOOD BANK DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PET NEEDS PANTRY DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - VETERANS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
